title: Habka Lacag-bixinta
subtitle: Deji bixiyeyaasha lacag-bixinta oo u ogolow macaamiisha inay ku bixiyaan Paystack ama Stripe
loadingConfig: Waa la soo raraya dejinta lacag-bixinta...

stripeLoadingLink: Waa la soo raraya xidhiidhka Stripe…
stripeCompleteOnboarding: Guji si aad u dhammaystirto dejinta Stripe
splitsNotActiveBody: Lacag-bixinada waxaa loo diraa akoonka guud iyada oo aan la qaybin. Tan hagaaji si si toos ah loogu maro lacag-qaadka 2% ee AskBiz ee dhaqdhaqaaq kasta.
splitsEnterPhone: Geli lambarkaaga M-Pesa si aad u xidho:
